docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE $0.00 SERVED JAN-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, SOMARA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PULSIPHER, JOYE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PULSIPHER, JOYE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TERRY, ANTHONY MILLER, SOMARA MURPHY, ALISON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
